_comment: Shared golden vectors for the drink-definition validator. Loaded by BOTH suites.
The bounds are GENERATED from android/.../domain/DrinkValidator.kt: a bound
changed on one platform and not the other turns a test red rather than letting
the two drift, which is how the rules came to disagree before v0.81.0.
`expected` is null when acceptable, else the FIRST violation in field order.
JSON cannot express NaN or the infinities, so those cases carry
Two cases pin string semantics Kotlin and Swift do not share by default: the
name length counts UTF-16 code units (Kotlin's String.length), and U+00A0 is a
character rather than whitespace (Java's Character.isWhitespace excludes the
non-breaking spaces, Swift's CharacterSet does not).

validate.description: an ordinary drink is accepted
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: alcohol-free beer is a drink worth logging
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: a blank name is rejected
a whitespace-only name is blank, not three characters
a tab-and-newline name is blank
a name at the limit is accepted
validate.name: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

validate.description: a name beyond the limit is rejected
validate.name: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

validate.description: length is measured after trimming
validate.name: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

validate.description: leading whitespace is trimmed too
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: length counts UTF-16 code units, so 100 emoji exceed the limit
50 emoji are 100 code units and fit exactly
a non-breaking space is a character, not whitespace
a name trimmed only of real whitespace keeps its NBSP
the lower volume bound is inclusive
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: the upper volume bound is inclusive
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: zero volume is rejected
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: a negative volume is rejected
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: one millilitre past the bound is rejected
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: the typo the bound exists to catch
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: the upper alcohol bound is inclusive
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: a negative alcohol percentage is rejected
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: an alcohol percentage above 100 is rejected
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: NaN is not finite
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: positive infinity is not finite
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: negative infinity is not finite
validate.name: Pils

validate.description: the first violation in field order wins: name before volume
the first violation in field order wins: volume before alcohol
validate.name: Pils
